productDisplayName: Murcia Women Silver Black Purse Silver Handbags
description: The look of this murcia bag is contemporary and the feel is of pure luxury. This bag is a must have for every woman with style and panache for fashion.Made of synthetic leather with nylon liningOne main zippered chamber with two magnetic buttoned chambers on either sidesOne small zippered chamber on the front Comfortable haul straps with adjustable long straps Brand badge in metal appliqué d on the frontBag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a mild leather cleaner
